bug.description: F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption

prompt:
There is a F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption downstream of function cucp_cuup_bearer_context_setup_e1ap in the openair2/RRC/NR subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/RRC/NR/cucp_cuup_e1ap.c:31.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
